titles.title: I’ve Got the Joy, Joy, Joy, Joy

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve got the joy, joy, joy, joy Down in my heart (Where?) Down in my heart (Where?) Down in my heart! I’ve got the joy, joy, joy, joy Down in my heart, Down in my heart to stay.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I’m so happy, so very happy I’ve got the love of Jesus in my heart; And I’m so happy, so very happy I’ve got the love of Jesus in my heart.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’ve got the love of Jesus, love of Jesus Down in my heart (Where?) Down in my heart (Where?) Down in my heart! I’ve got the love of Jesus, love of Jesus Down in my heart, Down in my heart to stay.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ve got the peace that passes understanding, Deep down in the depths of my heart (Where?) Deep down in the depths of my heart (Where?) Deep down in the depths of my heart! I’ve got the peace that passes understanding Deep down in the depths of my heart, Deep down in my heart to stay.
